privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic diagram editing task using draw.io. The metro system map diagram is created by setup_task.sh with an initial state containing a Red Line, Blue Line, and B1 Bus Route. The Silver Line should be drawn with color #A0A0A0 and width 12pt using orthogonal (90-degree) edges. Market St station must be renamed to Financial District. The B1 Bus Route must be removed. The final diagram must be exported as a PDF to /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/metro_map_v2.pdf. All metadata values are correctly specified and documented in the supporting files (silver_line_expansion_plan.txt and design_style_guide.txt).
